meaning: n.拦劫行人的强盗行为,劫盗,无理的讨价,停顿
examples: They arrived late due to a motorway holdup.
He is the victim of a masked holdup.
You must have some idea -- I mean, how close is -- I mean, is that the holdup?
That approach worked for his campaign in 2000, but whether it can holdup now will depend on him.
